Appearances:
Plaintiff Jahangr Massoudi is present. Yosef Tahbazof of Tahbazof Law Firm is present appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Julie Smith is present. Defendant Phillip Smith is not present.
Suneeta Fernandez is appearing for both defendants through limited scope.

Settlement conference held. Case settled. Trial date of 3/25/13 will be taken off calendar. JPT Elan Lambert, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
